phrases.text: Slow down for important or complex ideas.
Speed up for quick asides or lists.
one hundred twenty five words per minute
or one hundred fifty words per minute.
Short pause after a comma-like break.
Longer pause at the end of a thought.
And a five-second pause for dramatic effect.
This part should be delivered with more projection.
And this part should be quieter,
This opening should feel deliberate and very slow.
Now we are back at the base pace.
Mark stress by wrapping the stressed part:
so the reader knows where to breathe
By the way, we also support webhooks.
Isn't that exactly what we needed?
Or shift to a more relaxed tone for a moment.
Use highlight for key ideas that the reader must not miss.
An edit point marks a natural cut in recording.
This is after a high-priority edit point.
The recording can safely be split here.
And this is after a medium-priority one.
